label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 5

extraction.one_line_summary: SOLER Marc soloed from the breakaway over final Viveiro climb while MOLARD Rudy won the red jersey battle by refusing to chase with WRIGHT Fred.
tactical_patterns: MOLARD Rudy stared down WRIGHT Fred on final descent, neither chasing SOLER, prioritizing jersey math over stage.
SOLER Marc bridged twice to lead group after initially struggling first Viveiro passage, timing recovery perfectly.
STEWART Jake suffered cramp late after extended breakaway effort, revealing 187km distance punished even domestiques.
WRIGHT Fred refused chase duty to avoid working for competitors' jersey ambitions, gap shrank to 6 seconds but held.

rider_signals.SOLER Marc: positive: Showed rare recovery ability, initially dropped on Viveiro climb one but bridged back and attacked decisively on climb two.
rider_signals.MOLARD Rudy: positive: Tactically astute jersey play, deliberately let WRIGHT do no work while monitoring gap to steal red by 2 seconds.
rider_signals.WRIGHT Fred: neutral: Smart to refuse chase but lacked conviction to attack for stage, settling for young rider jersey consolation.
rider_signals.STEWART Jake: negative: Cramp ended strong breakaway ride, suggesting inadequate fueling or pacing over 187km tailwind effort.
rider_signals.LANGELLOTTI Victor: positive: Collected enough KOM points throughout breakaway to take polka dot jersey despite not contesting stage.
rider_signals.IMPEY Daryl: positive: Second place in breakaway sprint suggests form building, rarely seen this high in results.
